license_source: upstream model card supplied for review

model_avg_10.pth.role: average of the last 10 visual-only fine-tuning checkpoints

reported_training.preprocessing: MediaPipe face detection and mouth ROI crops in 16-second segments

limitations: Research use only; commercial use is prohibited.
The reported validation split is not the official LRS3 test set.
Frontal, relatively controlled LRS3 video does not establish real-world performance.
The checkpoint is a pickle-capable PyTorch format and must be treated as executable input.
The model must not be used for surveillance or non-consensual recognition.
